text: NEW TASK (not the video — that's cancelled): build a 3D-ANIMATED DESKTOP PET (桌宠) matching our 'Desktop AI Companion' card's glowing golden energy-orb. Full brief + reference image at ~/shared-review/desktop-pet/BRIEF.md (READ IT). Summary: a real-time WebGL/Three.js glowing golden swirling energy orb (vortex ring of fine golden filaments, dark core, soft bloom, transparent/dark bg), with idle 3D motion (rotate + turbulence + breathing pulse), matching reference_card.jpg as closely as possible. Self-contained index.html at ~/shared-review/desktop-pet/, plus a few PNG stills / screen-cap of it animating so the user can judge the match vs the image. Then bin/warroom-say '[Dali] done: 3D desktop-pet orb prototype'.
